query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `diaries` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `userId` int NOT NULL, `date` varchar(10) NOT NULL, `title` text, `content` text NOT NULL, `mood` varchar(10), `weather` varchar(10), `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `diaries_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
